Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Log Skeleton Dictionary activ_freq RO 1 CA 1 RI 1 PI 1 QC 1 PO 1 GSL 1 D 1 IC 1 RP 0 1

Name: Inductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Equivalence No activities are required to be equivalent in this scenario so the set remains empty

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Always Before The order of activities follows a strict sequence RO CA RI PI QC PO GSL D Therefore each activity must be executed before the next one in the sequence

Name: Deductive Reasoning - NE
Text: We add pairs like RO CA CA RI etc

Name: Deductive Reasoning - NE
Text: Always After The order of activities implies that each activity must be followed by the next activity in the sequence For example CA RI PI QC etc

Name: Inductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Never Together No activities are explicitly prohibited from co occurring in the same case so the set remains empty

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Activity Occurrences Each activity occurs exactly once except for RP which may occur 0 or 1 times optional

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - NE
Text: Directly Follows The sequence is strict so each activity is directly followed by the next one in the sequence

Name: Validation - NE
Text: Final Answer always_before RO CA CA RI RI PI PI QC QC PO PO GSL GSL D D IC IC RP always_after CA RI RI PI PI QC QC PO PO GSL GSL D D IC IC RP directly_follows RO CA CA RI RI PI PI QC QC PO PO GSL GSL D D IC IC RP
